message.content:
{
  "items": [
    {
      "objective": "Ensure the return or destruction of Company data upon termination of the Agreement.",
      "leverage": "The Company has a vested interest in protecting its data and ensuring compliance with data protection regulations.",
      "proposed_language": "Upon termination or expiration of this Agreement, the Developer shall return or securely destroy all Company data and personal information within 30 days.",
      "rationale": "This ensures that the Company retains control over its data and mitigates risks associated with data breaches or misuse after the contract ends.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.85
    },
    {
      "objective": "Clarify the definition of 'Services' to ensure comprehensive coverage.",
      "leverage": "A clear definition helps prevent misunderstandings and ensures that all necessary services are included.",
      "proposed_language": "The term 'Services' shall include all professional services necessary to fulfill the objectives of this Agreement, including but not limited to system analysis, program development, personnel training, documentation writing, general business consulting, and any additional services mutually agreed upon in writing.",
      "rationale": "This broadens the scope of services and protects the Company’s interests by ensuring all potential services are covered.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.75
    },
    {
      "objective": "Shorten the notification period for Data Breaches.",
      "leverage": "Timely notification is critical for mitigating damages and ensuring compliance with data protection laws.",
      "proposed_language": "In the event of a Data Breach, the Developer shall notify the Company immediately and no later than 24 hours after confirming the breach.",
      "rationale": "This allows the Company to respond quickly to potential threats and comply with regulatory requirements for data breaches.",
      "priority": "high",
      "confidence": 0.80
    },
    {
      "objective": "Define the requirements for custom software development more clearly.",
      "leverage": "Clear requirements help ensure that the final product meets the Company’s needs and reduces the risk of disputes.",
      "proposed_language": "The requirements for the custom software shall be defined collaboratively by both parties in a detailed requirements document prior to the commencement of each Phase.",
      "rationale": "This ensures that both parties have a mutual understanding of the project scope and reduces ambiguity in development.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.70
    },
    {
      "objective": "Establish a more structured approval process for programming specifications.",
      "leverage": "A structured process ensures that the Company has adequate oversight and control over the development process.",
      "proposed_language": "Upon delivery of programming specifications, the Company shall have 10 business days to review and provide feedback. If no feedback is provided within this timeframe, the specifications shall be deemed approved.",
      "rationale": "This provides a clear timeline for approvals and ensures that the Company is actively involved in the development process.",
      "priority": "medium",
      "confidence": 0.75
    }
  ]
}
